summary: Active cycle. Since last report: PR #915 (matchers path manipulation fix, closes #640), PR #916 (SQLite migration v2 action_type/severity index), and PR #922 (last EM report) all merged. PR #923 (denial-retry-escalation invariant, closes #908) is open but failing CI — Prettier formatting issue in monitor.ts needs fix. Critical security issue #924 filed as regression from PR #915: URL-encoded null byte (%00) bypasses canonicalizePath rejection. Assigning #924 to senior coder as follow-up to their #640 work. Health yellow due to CI-failing PR + critical unassigned security bug.
